title: Guardrails & Safety Serving
code:
import numpy as np

def evaluate_safety_logits(logits, toxic_indices, threshold=0.5):
    toxic_activation = logits[toxic_indices]
    return 'unsafe' if np.any(toxic_activation > threshold) else 'safe'

def run_practice():
    logits = np.array([0.1, 0.9])
    res = evaluate_safety_logits(logits, [1], 0.5)
    assert res == 'unsafe'
    print('[PASS] Safety logits validation checks completed.')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    run_practice()
